## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore

## Scope

- [ ] Frontend (`frontend/`)
- [ ] Shared (`shared/`)
- [ ] Supabase (`supabase/`)
- [ ] Docs (`docs/`)

## Quality checks

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Security and data

- [ ] No secrets/API keys committed
- [ ] New DB changes include migration
- [ ] New DB table changes include RLS policies

## Testing evidence

Describe how you tested this change.

## Screenshots (if UI changed)

Attach before/after screenshots or short video.

## Checklist

- [ ] Followed project conventions in `.github/copilot-instructions.md`
- [ ] Updated docs if behavior changed
- [ ] PR scope is focused and reviewable
